{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Reigan Shen’s death-aspected trident
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] recovered broken fragments of [[Reigan Shen’s death-aspected trident]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
